hero.title: Rent for days.
hero.description: Gear for extended adventures, from adventure lovers to adventure lovers. Get multi-day access to the reliable equipment you need for your trip, at affordable prices. More ride, zero hassle.

equipment.addOnsDescription: Rent essential accessories alongside your core gear:

about.title: Born from the
about.intro: RentNShred was built by adventure lovers, for adventure lovers. We focus on multi-day rentals of reliable, functional gear that enables you to do exactly what you want, without any unnecessary premium costs.
about.ideaText1: Traditional rentals can get complicated and expensive. We focus on simplicity: we provide sturdy, good-grade equipment that gets the job done perfectly, letting you focus on the ride.
about.ideaText2: We are a small, local company that started out to solve our own rental needs. We don't have massive corporate backing—we run entirely on the support of our incredible community of riders.
about.valuesText1: It does not need to be over-engineered, top-tier luxury brand gear to be perfect. We offer reliable, well-maintained equipment that is fully ready for action and does exactly what you need.
about.valuesText2: By supporting our local business, you are helping fellow outdoor enthusiasts build a sustainable alternative. We keep things friendly, approachable, and focused entirely on the enjoyment of the sport.
about.ctaText: Join our growing community of adventurers who choose real-world fun and practicality over high costs. Your next trip starts here.

contact.title: Get in touch.
contact.description: Have questions about our gear, locations, or group events? Our small but dedicated team is here to help you get out there.
contact.successMsg: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

content.vat: According to § 19 UStG (German Value Added Tax Act), VAT is not calculated or stated on invoices due to small business status (Kleinunternehmerstatus).

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Data Protection
privacy.intro: This privacy policy provides information about how RentNShred handles your personal data. We value your privacy and only collect what is strictly necessary to provide our services.

sections.text: We collect personal information such as name, email address, and payment details when you make a booking. This information is used solely for the fulfillment of the rental agreement.
We store your data as long as required by law or for as long as necessary to provide the services requested. Financial records are kept for the duration of the fiscal requirements.
You have the right to request access to the data we hold, to have it corrected or deleted, and to withdraw your consent at any time.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: User Agreement
terms.intro: By renting equipment from RentNShred, you agree to the following terms and conditions. These ensure a safe and enjoyable experience for everyone.

sections.text: The rental period for a single-day rental goes from morning to evening of the same day (and is not a 24-hour period). Late returns may incur additional fees.
The renter is responsible for the proper care of the equipment. Excessive damage or loss will be billed at repair or replacement cost.
Outdoor sports involve inherent risks. RentNShred is not liable for injuries sustained while using the equipment. We strongly recommend professional instruction.
